title: Visually Waterlogged
description: Adds a green algae layer on waterlogged blocks
body:
# Visually Waterlogged!
### About
This pack adds a green algae layer on waterlogged blocks!
Can be useful when using top slabs as a floor or something

🚨 1.21.2+ REQUIRED 🚨

### Currently supported blocks:
- Slabs
- Stairs
- Fences
- Walls

### Notice
Unfortunately the overlay doesn't work with custom textures

I tried but I couldn't figure it out so every block has to have its own wet texture :/

### Showcase
![All wet block textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FuRfUG4B/images/0500d27b9861c754a5308883e0b4d098239b7f58.png)
